subcodes.first_line: O fruit of the divine tree of God's bounty! When these grievous new tidings reached the ears of these wanderers, sorrows, like [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره شجره موهبت الله حوادث مصیبت جدیده چون بسمع این آوارگان رسید احزان چون
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
